overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a dark robe exploring a grand gothic castle interior. The character descends a marble staircase, crosses a candle-lit hall with a central fountain, and walks through ornate corridors with portraits and statues.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall with central fountain

agents.ego_description: walking down a wide marble staircase toward a central fountain at the bottom

entered.detail: wide marble staircase with ornate railings being descended
large circular fountain with statue in the center of the hall
decorative stone balustrades lining the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character descends a grand marble staircase into a large candle-lit hall. A central fountain with a statue stands at the bottom of the stairs, surrounded by ornate railings and candelabras.

scene_state.functional_zone: main hall floor with geometric marble patterns

events.description: character turns right toward the side staircase

agents.ego_description: crossing the hall floor and turning toward a staircase on the right side

entered.detail: secondary staircase on the right side of the hall
large framed artworks hanging on the distant walls

segments.scene_description: Having reached the bottom of the stairs, the character crosses the patterned marble floor, passing the central fountain now to the left, and turns toward a staircase on the right side of the hall.

events.description: character enters the portrait corridor through an arched doorway

agents.ego_description: climbing the side staircase and entering a narrow corridor lined with portraits

entered.detail: framed portraits hanging on the corridor walls
gothic arched doorway at the end of the corridor
decorative stone pillars along the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the side staircase and enters a narrower corridor with stone columns and framed portraits on the walls, passing through an arched doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: portrait gallery corridor with arched ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the corridor passing framed portraits on both sides

entered.detail: high vaulted ceiling with stone arches

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a long corridor with an arched ceiling, passing numerous framed portraits hanging on both walls, illuminated by wall sconces.

scene_state.functional_zone: darker corridor with statues in alcoves

events.description: corridor becomes noticeably darker with more dramatic shadows

agents.ego_description: proceeding through a dimly lit corridor lined with statues in wall alcoves

entered.detail: stone statues positioned in wall alcoves
decorative stone arches framing the corridor sections

segments.scene_description: The lighting shifts to a darker, more atmospheric tone as the character enters a section of corridor featuring statues positioned in alcoves along the walls, with intricate stonework visible in the arches.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor end with knight statue and door

agents.ego_description: approaching a large knight statue standing before a wooden door at the corridor's end

entered.detail: tall armored knight statue on a pedestal
large wooden door with metal fixtures behind the statue

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the end of the corridor where a prominent knight statue stands on a pedestal before a large wooden door, illuminated by wall sconces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a grand, open hall into the increasingly narrow and atmospheric depths of a gothic corridor. It begins as the character descends a marble staircase into a candle-lit hall, moving past a central fountain and ornate railings toward a side staircase. As the character ascends these stairs, the scene shifts through an arched doorway into a narrower passage lined with stone columns and framed portraits. The environment then transitions into a darker, more moody tone, moving past statues nestled in alcoves and intricate stonework under an arched ceiling. Finally, the camera follows the character toward the end of the corridor, passing a prominent knight statue on a pedestal before arriving at a large wooden door illuminated by wall sconces.
